meta.title: Is vibe coding real coding?
meta.description:
Andrew Ng on why openness matters, especially now, as more people build software through vibe coding and AI-assisted development.

At AI Dev, we bring together people building, learning, and contributing to real AI systems, regardless of background.

We’ll continue these conversations at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29. 

Tickets available: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
